# liff_app (Resource)

Manages a LINE LIFF application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "liff_app" "example" {
  description            = "My LIFF App"
  permanent_link_pattern = "concat"
  bot_prompt             = "normal"
  scope                  = ["openid", "profile"]

  view {
    type        = "full"
    url         = "https://example.com"
    module_mode = false
  }

  features {
    qr_code = true
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `view` (Attributes) LIFF app view settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--view))

### Optional

- `bot_prompt` (String) Specify the setting for bot link feature. One of `normal`, `aggressive`, `none`.
- `description` (String) Name of the LIFF app.
- `features` (Attributes) LIFF app feature settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--features))
- `permanent_link_pattern` (String) How additional information in LIFF URLs is handled. Specify `concat`.
- `scope` (List of String) Array of scopes.

### Read-Only

- `liff_id` (String) The LIFF app ID.

<a id="nestedatt--view"></a>
### Nested Schema for `view`

Required:

- `type` (String) Size of the LIFF app view. One of `compact`, `tall`, `full`.
- `url` (String) Endpoint URL (HTTPS).

Optional:

- `module_mode` (Boolean) Use the LIFF app in modular mode.


<a id="nestedatt--features"></a>
### Nested Schema for `features`

Optional:

- `qr_code` (Boolean) Whether to use the 2D code reader.

Read-Only:

- `ble` (Boolean) Whether the LIFF app supports BLE (read-only).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import liff_app.example "1234567890-AbCdEfGh"
```
